segment-text: INT. BASEMENT - HANDHELD SHOT - DANIEL'S POV - NIGHT

A dingy floor, a beer bottle, a notebook of scribbles. A feeling of uneasiness. SLURP CHUG SPLASH A shaky hand sets down a beer bottle. THUD THUD THUD Someone is walking heavily down a stair case nearby.
PAN TO - CASEY SMITH
A regular looking guy with a soccer ball in hand and a slightly exasperated expression approaches.
Dude what's going on, I've been looking for you for like the last ten minutes. You're not in your
(interrupting) Melissa's pregnant. Fuck man, what the fuck am I going to do? (pacing back and forth nervously)
Man, are you sure she's pregnant
INT. DANIEL'S ROOM - NIGHT
Stuff is strewn about and a small untidy room. The walls are bare except for a few decorations and blue bottles on the window sill.

23 years old, slightly unshaven, attractive, sitting on a bed in his room. His left hand grasps a notebook with blank pages. His right hand firmly clutches a plain ballpoint pen. PEN TIP touches the paper. He pauses. He writes "the" and lets out a barley audible sigh. He stares at the blank pages and starts to write again. INSERT - NOTEBOOK Written in barley readable handwriting. "The moonlight shone wildly in the man's eyes on this lonely night." BACK TO SCENE

Stands up and takes his over shirt off, revealing a strong, lean physique. He picks up the notebook, puts the pen in his mouth and paces back and forth in his cramped room. TAP TAP TAP fingers beat against the notebook. He's eyes look up at the ceiling, he's lost in thought. Daniel drops to the ground, look up, grunts. Daniel's body furiously moves up and down. He's doing pushups. He continues, he strains, the veins in his arms bulge. His face is serious and his pace slows to a... stop. His hands shake. DANIEL RISES
INT. COMMON AREA - NIGHT

A dark rundown room with a big screen TV and worn out couch. Casey relaxes on the couch with a beer in his hand. His eyes are glued to the television screen. The flickering glow of the television set interrupts the darkness of the room. Daniel enters the room wearing the same clothing as in the previous scene.
(looking up at Daniel) Hey-what are you up to?
Comedian on Television set (O.S.) is in the middle of a satirical stand up routine. His jokes and laugh track interrupt the dialogue between Daniel and Casey.
Not much.
Want a beer?
Hell yeah.
You got it.
Casey throws Daniel a beer from a half empty case sitting at foot of the couch. Daniel opens it, sits down, and drinks heavily.
INT. COMMON AREAS - COUCH - DANIEL AND CASEY - NIGHT
Casey laughs crazily. Daniel drinks more beer.
INT. COMMON AREAS - COUCH - DANIEL AND CASEY - NIGHT
Daniel is on the couch. Multiple beer cans are sloppily near him.
Holy shit you sucked those fuckers down!
Hell yeah, looking for some inspiration.
From cheap beer?
(sarcastically) From the inner part of my psyche.
(Grinning) What do you write about anyways?
Tonight, Sci-fi garbage
Casey laughs and turns his attention to the TV,. Daniel joins him. Casey is asleep on the couch. TV is still on. Daniel puts away a few beer cans and then turns the TV off.
The end of yet another day in dreary Eugene. 10 beers, bad TV, no ideas. With Casey asleep I'll have only the phosphorus glow of my monitor, the
click of the keyboard, and the
INT. DANIEL'S ROOM - NIGHT
His eyes are a hazy and mildly blood shot. He gets on his COMPUTER. He stares at an older laptop. His fingers pound the keys.
(a few mouse clicks) regional chat rooms... (reading off the screen) What do you look like? What kind of a question is that to start things off?
Daniel's words appear on the screen as he types them. And cut between Daniel his computer monitor.
I'm a 250 lb. Steroid pumping black sex machine.
I'm a hypochondriac nurse who's afraid of blood.
I am a child prodigy.
I am an 83 year old swinger.
BACK TO SCENE Daniel smirks.
I am Batman.
Everybody here have insomnia like me?
INT. MELISSA'S BEDROOM - NIGHT

Melissa's tossing back and forth. She sits up quickly and opens her eyes, awakened from a NIGHTMARE. CLOSEUP - MELISSA'S FACE She turns on the light, rubs her eyes and reaches for her computer, yawning. MELISSA'S POV She presses the button on her computer and it comes on. BACK TO SCENE Melissa fixes her hair with a headband and stares intently at the computer screen. And cut between Melissa and her computer monitor.
(Smiling and typing) Just a fellow insomniac.
INT. DANIEL'S ROOM - SAME TIME
He's at the computer typing. And cut between Daniel and the computer monitor.
Sucks huh?
INTERCUT instant messaging conversation.
Yeah, it does.
She smiles knowingly.
I don't sleep well normally...
I'm a little shaky at the moment 'cause I just woke up.
Shaky...shaky? Why Shaky from waking up?
I had a crazy nightmare.
She rubs her eyes as she reads Daniel's words.
I'm sorry. What was it about?
It's sort of fuzzy, but what I remember is that it was pitch black, and... (voice trails off) ...I think it was chasing me...
CLOSEUP - DANIEL'S FACE He's intrigued. BACK TO SCENE
(continuing story) I kept trying to run away but it came closer and closer...
You like William Blake?
(Smiling a little) Sometimes.
I'm not much for modern poetry, but give me Yeats and I'm pretty happy.
Yeah, modern poetry kind of sucks. Its either way to sappy or way too abstract
Tell me about something you've written.
OK...

...then he's doing a seminar at a high school and he's shot and killed by the woman he hurt in his past. He dies in his wife's arms, but he isn't sad he's happy and says that he finally found Harmony in his life. Which is also her name and the name of book he wrote.
That's awesome. Can you send me the draft? I'd love to read it. You've got me all interested.
CLOSEUP - DANIEL'S FACE Looks like he's thinking about something really hard.
What's your E-mail address?
(hesitantly) 16/F/ Portland does that matter?
(beat) Of course not; we're just talking. I like talking to you.
She smiles sweetly to herself, as if pleased.
Thanks, I like talking to you too.
It's six. We stayed up all night.
Oh my God, are you joking?
She smiles ruefully.
Don't you have classes soon?
Yes! At seven! And a student council meeting! I'm going to be a wreck!
Melissa sits back, smiling.
Well, I would say good night, but that would be pointless.
She shuts her computer, looking up thoughtfully at the ceiling.
INT. DANIEL'S ROOM - DAY
Daniel closes his laptop. Melissa's goodbye lingers in his head.
Good day, then?
He leaps onto his bed and laughs.
CLOSEUP - DANIEL
He's gazing at the ceiling, smiling contentedly.
INT. HALLWAY - DAY
Daniel walks down a long dismal hallway lined with doors on each side. Feeling of dreamyness.
INT. COMMON AREAS - CONTINUOUS - DAY
A low lit game room with a pool table and dying plants as decorations. CRACK Casey blasts his cue on a group of pool balls sending them bouncing off the railing. Daniel enters.
(noticing Daniel) Look who's back from the dead?
Daniel looks tired and slightly anxious, but still happy.
Yeaaaaaaaaaah
Daniel picks up a nearby pool cue.
You're up early.
Yeah, got work in an hour.
That sucks
Yeah... You going to Lauren's party this week.
Um.. Is it going to be a sausage fest?
Oh probably, No dude she's bringing the entire volley ball team. Yeah, You know Amy the blonde with the big rack... I'm going
(interrupting) Is it going to be a kegger what kinda party is it?
No! it's social class. You get to be part of the aristocracy.
Oh, is there going to be like classy chicks all dressed up in dresses and stuff
Dude, that's what I'm talking about.
Casey bring the pool stick to his crotch and motions with his hips.
(humorous voice) Maybe get some poontang.
Daniel laughs and continues to play pool.
You're a freak man.
So how's that literary masterpiece coming along?
How do you think? It's not. I've been going through some writer's block.
Writer's block? So what do you do at night when you can't sleep.
Casey motions with his hand like his jacking off.
I.. Uh.. work out
Oh, right on. Work out. That's why your right arm is better then your left I take it. Casey motions again with his hand.
Hey, That's a
Hey, someone brought it to my attention it wasn't me.
(jokingly again) That's a conq.
Daniel looks at the pool table and then at Casey again. He turns slightly more serious.
So anyways I've been talking to some chick, dude, online. She's hot.
What?
Some chick dude, she's hot
(seriously) Where did you meet her?
Online
Daniel hits a ball in slowly. He looks up and smiles in anticipation of the joke.
Dude, she's fat.
How do you know?
All online chicks are heffers, Shalom!
She's hot
(prying) Oh, so you've seen her?
I will.
Have you seen her
I will.
Oh so I see you haven't, you're going whalin budy. That's right.
Casey hold the pool stick up like a javelin.
Man the harpoon.
INT. DANIEL'S ROOM - NIGHT
Daniel sits in front of his bed. Tape recorder in hand. CLICK he hits the record button.
(speaking into the recorder) Hello, this is Daniel Weston's stream of consciousness. Yet another attempt at writing something that doesn't lick balls
Daniel gets up and walks over to his desk. He turns on a STEREO and some UPBEAT MUSIC PLAYS.
There is an endless array of grass. Bright green, lush and calming. The sun is high, the sky a perfect shade

of blue oblivion. A group of people are in a herd, all banded together wearing tattered clothing. Their eyes are wide open, gazes held at fixed at points in the distance. Their hair is torn by wind that's no longer present. There is a path of pure granite cutting through the
together walking. Slowly, staggering, but always walking, they are searching for the end. The end is what they
He presses stop on the recorder, puts it down
EXT. COLLEGE TOWN STREETS - LATER ON - NIGHT

Typical university housing street, with low cost houses, apartments, and signs of young people. Daniel is standing outside his apartment building wearing headphones. SLOW ZOOM ON DANIEL He walks in a direction-less wonder gazing randomly at the empty streets and buildings. He looks lost. Daniel crosses an empty street, he's lit by the glow of the many street lights. He pauses and stares into the night's sky.
CLOSEUP - DANIEL
He looks up and stares hard at a full moon Daniel walks away and disappears into the darkness of a empty street.
INT. DANIEL'S BEDROOM - NIGHT
Daniel takes a swing off an a energy drink. His eyes are fixed on his computer.
Hi, how have you been?
INT. MELISSA'S BEDROOM - SAME TIME
Good. A little tired in school, though.
INTERCUT instant messaging conversation.
So what part of the high school caste system are you in? I bet you're popular...
Um... kinda. I mean, I know a lot of people.
That's awesome. I was a bit of a longer in high school, unfortunately.
Why's that? You seem really nice.
Please don't say that
Why not?
Because girls don't like nice guys.
I do.
Really? Well, who are you dating? A big football jock?
No... I'm not dating anybody. What about you?
No, I'm still waiting for someone to blow me away.
Do you have a picture of yourself?
I have a digital camera. I could take one right now.
Cool
Do you have a pic?
Yes, and I'll send it after I get yours.
Okay... give me a sec. (muttering to himself) Picture picture picture...
He pulls out his digital camera and turns it on. He makes funny faces taking pictures and trying to be sexy, pulling his sleeve up. Daniel takes a few pictures. Chooses one.
OK... Here it is.
Daniel nervously presses the send button and waits.
(surprised) Oh My God, you look so young!
Greeaat!
No you're cute, really cute. And so buff. Do you work out a lot?
Thanks. I do a lot of of pushups, sit-ups and handstand presses. At night when I can't sleep. I also do martial arts.
You're so cute.
I prefer sexy.
Very sexy.
Now send me your pic (typing, muttering to himself) Please don't be a heifer... please don't be a heifer.
A picture pops up on the screen. Daniel just stares. He is so taken in he doesn't speak right away.
That bad huh?
No.. You're beautiful, completely beautiful. You have the most beautiful intense eyes I've ever seen.
You're just saying that.
I don't do that. I'm serious...
Melissa, do you like chest hair?
What kind of a question is that? I swear you're the king of random.
I don't know... I have some and was wondering what you thought.
Um, I don't particularly like it, but it's OK.
OK
Daniel smiles. Melissa closes her computer and looks up. She's happy.
INT. KITCHEN - NIGHT
A shared kitchen area with two large microwaves. Daniel takes a container of wax and puts it in one of the microwaves.
INT. APARTMENT SHARED BATHROOMS - NIGHT

CLOSEUP - DANIEL'S HANDS Daniel uses a small stick to mix a container of thick gooey wax. Daniel takes off his shirt, revealing a thin muscular body with thick black chest hair. He takes a strip of paper and applies the wax mixture to it. He presses some paper strips up against his chest and they stick to it. He puts them on until they cover up his entire chest. He grabs one corner of the first strip with his fingers. He breathes in and out deeply.
Okay one... two...
Daniel rips off the strip taking all the hair on his chest with it.
Aaarrrggghhhhhhhh!
CASEY enters nonchalantly to use the bathroom.
What the fuck?
(embarrassed) Don't ask man.
You're crazy man

Daniel RIPS another strip off his chest. He SCREAMS in pain and then LAUGHS as if he can't believe what he's doing. RIP Daniel slowly pulls off another strip. His irritated chest is spotted with hairy and non hairy regions. Daniel looks at Casey and breaks into LAUGHTER.
(Turning to look at Casey) Things you do for chicks, huh?
(Using the urinal) Ah that's great... that's classic, props to you; I couldn't do it.
I'm bleeding. Check it out.
Daniel points to a red spot on his chest
I'd just shave it
(relieved laughter) Ok. Oh god...
Wax strip with clumps of hair from Daniel's chest.
EXT. HIGH SCHOOL - DAY
Melissa, wearing a backpack and regular school clothes, walks home from high school.
ZOOM ON - MELISSA
She walks across a bridge and messes with her hair.
INT. MELISSA JONE'S BEDROOM - NIGHT

The bedroom is light and feminine. Melissa is talking to a friend. She's wearing sexy and cute school clothes. She is on her cell phone. She takes down a hanging mirror and is attempting to see how her new jeans look.
Uh huh... I hope so... no, I missed practice today 'cause I wasn't feeling well... Yeah... I don't know though. Should I wear those new jeans I got?
She looks around for a place to set the mirror. She holds the mirror behind her again to try and see her butt. She's obviously distracted.
I think they make my ass look totally hot... uh huh... trying to see it.
She sets the mirror down on the chair, still attempting to get a good view.

So anyway, are you going to the football game this Saturday? Is Jason is going to be there? Yeah, I love them. Oh yeah, I'm totally going to wear them... yes, you should definitely wear the skirt... no, the skirt looks totally cute... yeah.
Turns yet again to try and see her rear. She is still distracted.
Hmm... no... forget it... but just take my word on it... mhmm.
She struggles a bit with the mirror. Her parents are arguing in the other room. MR. JONES is shouting something at MRS. JONES. Their words are muffled.
(Sighing) Oh god, I can hear my parents going at it yet again. They never stop. Yeah, I've gotta go... k, bye.

Melissa walks to the wall to replace the mirror. She has problems getting it straight. She walks to her bed, puts her hair up and sits on the bed to do her homework. She looks bored and goes to the book shelf; she grabs a book, lays down, and begins to read.
CLOSEUP - BOOK
The picture of a dragon hints at a Fantasy book.
INT. COMMONS - DANIEL'S BEDROOM - DAY

The room is encased in darkness. Suddenly an ALARM BEEPS. Daniel MOANS and SLAPS the alarm clock. It BEEPS faster and LOUDER. Daniel grunts, SMACKS it again, and the lights comes on to reveal Daniel's back. He is in boxers. He puts on a Gadget City uniform and tries opening his eyes really wide, but they continue to shut.
INT - COMMONS - TRACKING SHOT - HALLWAY
Daniel steps into the hallway and pauses to smack himself on the cheek. He walks down the hall.
INT. COMMONS - STAIRWELL
Daniel clomps down the stairs to the exit door.
(in a mocking voice) Welcome to Gadget City. Sir, may I show you our projection TV's. This TV is the best. You should get this one. Absolutely.
EXT. PARKING LOT
Daniel walks toward his car.
INT. CAR - DRIVING TO WORK

(In a mocking voice) What are you going to do when this breaks? I think you should really go with our extended warranty. Yes you definitely should. Are you sure? Nope, I'm sorry I can't just ring this up for you until I fully present the warranty. I really think you need it. Sir, come back. Please... (laughing at himself) I fucking hate selling extended warranties.
INT. MELISSA'S BEDROOM - DAY
Melissa is dressed in normal school clothes. Her friend CLARISSA, a slightly preppy teenage girl, is sitting next to her. They're doing homework.
What are you wearing for Jason's Halloween party?
I don't know. I'm thinking of going as Catwoman. Do you think I could pull it off?
Absolutely, it would be awesome. We could get soem black hair dye, maybe some leather pants...
I don't know, Amy might copy me. She's been being such a bitch lately.
God, I know! She's really a nice girl, but she's just so selfish. I don't know what it is, but she has some weird kind of competition thing with you.
Me neither...
But so what if she copies you; you'll look better in it anyway.
They giggle and continue with their homework. The girls playing on the bed and tickling each other. They are laughing as Melissa hugs Clarissa. Its obvious they're best friends.
(Calming down) Um... ok. I have a question... do you think 23 is too old?
Too old for what?
Don't freak out on me, OK?
Clarissa nods with a curious expression on her face.
Well, I met this guy online, his name is Daniel and he's really awesome. He's sweet, and wonderful, and he's just so amazing.
Clarissa listens patiently.
(Taking a deep breath) The only problem is that he's twenty- three.
You met him online? I don't know... that's kind of risky. I mean, what if he's some kind of psycho or deranged lunatic?
(Eagerly) No, he's not, he's not, he's totally not!
How do you know?
I can just tell; we connect. When I'm talking to him I just feel so comfortable. He's sweet, and nice, and romantic... he feels like my soulmate or something.
That's cool I guess. It's still weird though. What does he look like? Is he hot?
Very...
Let me see... oho, you're right. (Teasingly) Age might not matter.
(giggling) You really think so?
INT. MELISSA'S BEDROOM - NIGHT

SLOW ZOOM ON MELISSA She's sitting in a chair typing. She's wearing a blouse and underwear. She has a blanket wrapped around her and is intent on the computer screen. And cut between Melissa and Daniel.
INT. DANIEL'S ROOM - SAME TIME

Daniel is sitting at his computer typing. He's smiling and looks like he recently finished working out. And cut between Daniel and the computer screen INTERCUT instant message conversation between Daniel and Melissa.
Hey, I missed you. How's your mom?
Doing better. She's been fighting a lot less with my dad.
That's good. Hopefully it will last. My parents used to fight like crazy and they are always at each other's throats. I never want to be like that... I wrote you something.
No one's ever done anything like that for me before.
You're worth it. Okay, here it is. Ode to Melissa
CLOSEUP - MELISSA'S FACE
(Wonderingly) Ode to Melissa I greet the fly that lands on my bed I try to find words worthy of your presence.
She's very moved as she reads the poem.
Outside, you lurk with nervous feline eyes. Day yawns to night, Trees become dark bodies -- Giant shadow

puppets of street lamp Halos. She grabs her webcam and begins to hook it up to her computer. Daniel looks more and more surprised as he watches his computer screen. Melissa's voice continues to read the poem.
(Reading off screen) Accept webcam... YES!
Eyes close to the warmth of dreams Green dreams of happy tomorrows, And you busy, calm, watchful night You are the cool darkness between Days. The molecules of time sleep, Their
quiet undulations Across your starry hands DANIEL'S POV He's watching Melissa steady a green webcam.
As I lie and watch your naked skin Bathed by moonlight. Oh... wow.
The webcam stops shaking.
I have a surprise for you.
(Reading the screen) Accept webcam request (beat) Yes.
Daniel leans forward. Melissa rises and slowly begins to unbutton her shirt. Daniel's eyes open wider as she continues to unbutton her shirt slowly. DANIEL LEANS BACK IN HIS CHAIR
Ahhh...

Melissa opens the shirt completely. She looks into the camera as if looking directly at Daniel. She slowly undoes her bra and lets it open slightly. Her perfect, perky breasts are exposed for a few seconds. Daniel is typing rapidly.
I want to call you.

Daniel is flushed with emotion. He calls her and her PHONE RINGS. Melissa pulls her shirt closed again and grabs her RINGING CELL PHONE. She puts it to her ear. INTERCUT phone call between Melissa and Daniel.
Hi. (beat)
How are you doing?
Great.
You should tell your dad how you feel.
You think he'll actually understand?
No, but at least it's a good start.
The beginning of your script Harmony is based off you huh?
How did you know that?
I could just tell.
So what happened at school?
If you could do anything right now, what would it be?
I don't know, something with you.
I'd want to feel a cool breeze on a high mountain lake sitting near a bonfire, looking at the stars... that's where I'd like to be.
Oho... that sounds nice... but I would want some marshmallows.
(Smiling) Definitely. It's all about the marshmallows.
CLOSEUP - CLOCK - TIME PASSING
Good night Melissa
Good night Daniel
Good luck on your test tomorrow; I hope you're not too tired.
I'll be alright. Thanks though. And bye!
Bye.
Daniel picks up a notebook and begins to write feverishly.
INT. COMMONS - HALLWAY - DAY
CASEY exits his room with happy expression and two beer bottles in hand. He walks a few doors down to Daniel's room.
CLOSEUP - CASEY
LOUDLY KNOCKS on the door. He takes a large swig from one of the beers he's holding. No answer. He knocks again.
INT. DANIEL'S ROOM - DAY
Daniel, looking very tired, stumbles to the door and opens it. He sees Casey standing there grinning.
Just get up?
(very sleepy) Um.. Yeah.
(Handing Daniel a beer) Time for some pre-party beer action.
Oh yeah?
Daniel takes the beer and sluggishly takes a drink. Casey takes a seat on Daniel's bed and looks around. He picks up a shirt lying somewhere.
(throwing the shirt at Daniel) It's Friday night, it's going to be rockin,' lets go. (Jokingly) Come on twinkletoes -- come on
INT. CASEY'S ROOM - DAY
Daniel and Casey both have beers in their hands and are sitting across from each other with a chess set between them. They are both in a very happy mood.
I can't believe you got me to drink Steel Piss Tap
Aw, it's good for you dude.
Daniel and Casey clink their beers as they share a cheer.
It puts the lead in your pencil.
Daniel laughs and takes another swig.
So how's that Melissa thing going?
I don't know... well, Melissa's great, beautiful, sweet, nice...
Then what's the problem?
Daniel picks up a chess piece and moves it.
She's sixteen... check!
(negative sigh) Oh.
Don't tell me you haven't thought about being with a younger chick dude. I know you. Casey, Casey Smith on the prowl.
(laughing) That's something, ah... sixteen? That's pretty young. That's something that, you know, you think about and you talk about, but you don't actually do. Like banging your step mom.
Casey moves a chess piece confidently.
(surprised) You banged your step mom?
(rolling his eyes) Nevermind, dude.
Oh man.
Dude, I was joking. Snarfer.
Daniel moves a piece and puts CASEY'S king in check.
Check.
Ahhhhhh, shit.
(quietly) Sarah's going to be back in town this month.
Yeah? You two still talk?
Yeah, we managed to stay friends.
Are you still in love with her?
No.
That's good at least.
Daniel moves another piece and puts CASEY in check again.
Check.
Damn... Shit ... I'm never playing this game again. Why do I suck so bad? It's the beer.
Is this party going to be any good? What's the back up plan? Walking up and down University Street, smashed, causing havoc?.
(grinning) Actually, that is the backup plan.
INT. RANDOM PARTY - NIGHT
Daniel sits on a couch, looking dazed and drunk. His eyes move slowly back and forth, and he looks totally out of it. He's holding a cell phone to his ear and wears and expectant expression.
INT. MELISSA'S BEDROOM - NIGHT
Melissa is sleeping. RING RING. She wakes up, dazed, fumbling for her cell phone. She looks at the caller ID. She answers in a SLEEPY VOICE.
Hello?
(Slurring) Hey Melissaaa... this is Daniel... I'm bleeding inside... I wanted to tell you... I need you.
(Concerned) Are you okay? Where are you at?
Melissa... I love you. I want to hold you... and fuck you... and tell you I love you...
(Annoyed) You're drunk. You need to get home and go to sleep.
No I wanted to tell you... and I want to be with you... you're perfect. I want to see you...
(A little desperately) Please, just try and get home safe. We can talk tomorrow when you're sober.
I'm serious... I love you, I want to be with you... will you marry me?
(Now angry) Daniel, its 4:30 am. Call me when you're sober.
I'm serious... will you marry me?
(Angry and annoyed) Good bye, Daniel. (hangs up)
Melissa hangs up and curls in a ball with her hands over her face.
INT. DANIEL'S ROOM - MORNING

Daniel is still wearing his clothes. He rolls back and forth. He opens his eyes, looking dazed and extremely hung over. There is vomit on his chin, cheeks, and the front of his shirt. He looks nauseous. Daniel slowly stands up. He looks as if he could collapse at any minute. He walks out of his room.
INT. COMMON AREA - MORNING
Daniel sits down on the couch. COLLEGE STUDENT #1 is watching TV.
Hey. Are you alright?
Yeah. I drank way too much last night.
COLLEGE STUDENT #2 enters. She gives Daniel a funny look.
Man. You don't look so good.
CASEY enters and looks at Daniel.
Dude... you look like shit.
Thanks.
INT. BATHROOM - MORNING
Daniel is showering. IT is hot and steam starts to fill the room. A person uses the stall next to the shower and flushes.
Ow! Hot hot hot... damn it.
INT. DANIEL'S ROOM - AFTERNOON

Daniel is lying on his bed again. He is holding his phone and looking through the calls to see who he called while in his drunken stupor. INSERT cell phone screen showing "Melissa." He groans and puts his head in his hands.
EXT. COMMONS - SIDEWALK - DAY
Hello?
Hi... this is Daniel. How are you?
I'm OK.
I'm sorry about last night. I was really drunk. I spent all day lying in bed dry heaving.
Why did you do that to yourself? Do you even remember all the stuff you told me on the phone last night?
Not really. I was feeling lonely. I'm sorry for waking you up last night to talk to a drunken idiot.
It's not OK, but I'm fine.
I still want to meet you though.
I don't know...
SUPER: TWO WEEKS LATER EXT. PARK - DANIEL AND GIRL WALKING - DAY
Girl is SARAH. Daniel and Sarah are walking together, but not too close.

It's been two weeks since my drunken exuberance. Sarah my ex finance is back to walk over me yet again. When asked about my love life I mentioned Melissa. Of course I changed her age to 19. I feel like the proverbial loner, mentioning a girl I've never met.
INT. RESTAURANT - DANIEL AND SARAH - DAY
Why are you still here? You graduated two years ago. Shouldn't you be moving on?
I don't know. I guess I'm just waiting for some inspiration. To come out and be like... Here I am world Daniel Weston. I'm waiting to write my masterpiece.
Don't wait too long. So how was your weekend? Did you go out?
Yeah and I got hit on by some older chicks.
Is that good?
It's not good or bad, they just drank a little too much and couldn't help themselves.
Ahh. Okay.
Probably thought that if I got drunk enough I'd take them home... kinda sad actually.
I'm sure. So nothing came of that?
Um...not exactly my type. Yeah, there were no girls for me; no one that was interesting at least.
Interesting enough to what?
To date. I want to be blown away, but I haven't met a girl yet who's done that to me. Maybe it's not even possible. I mean, I've loved girls, but I haven't been blown away by them.

After making his food, he looks at it again. He's a little bewildered and opens the envelope. It contains the manuscript and a small note. He picks up the note. JONES frowns a little, shrugs and sits down on the couch, manuscript in hand. MR. JONES in the middle of reading the paper. While he's reading we hear Daniel'S VOICE OVER.
